design_philosophy.core_identity: Warm, Inclusive, Secure. A digital companion that feels like a family member, not a hospital administrator.
design_philosophy.target_audience: Family caregivers (sandwich generation), elderly care recipients, professional aides.
design_philosophy.accessibility_focus: High contrast, large touch targets (44px+), clear legible fonts, voice-first options.

tech_stack_guidelines.components: Custom React Native components mimicking Shadcn/UI aesthetics

primary.description: Warm Terracotta - Represents care, warmth, and vitality.

neutral.description: Warm Cream & Stone - Avoids clinical stark white.

buttons.primary: bg-primary-default py-4 px-6 rounded-full shadow-md active:opacity-90 flex-row justify-center items-center
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary-light/20 border-2 border-secondary-default py-3 px-6 rounded-full active:bg-secondary-light/40 flex-row justify-center items-center
buttons.emergency: bg-semantic-error py-4 px-8 rounded-full shadow-lg border-2 border-white flex-row justify-center items-center

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-sm border border-neutral-100
cards.interactive: bg-white rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-sm border border-neutral-100 active:scale-[0.98] transition-transform

inputs.base: bg-neutral-50 border border-neutral-200 rounded-xl p-4 text-lg text-neutral-900 focus:border-primary-default focus:bg-white
inputs.label: text-base font-semibold text-neutral-700 mb-2

hero_family.alt: Older woman holding a baby - multigenerational care

caregiver_support.alt: Smiling senior woman - Profile placeholder or Success State

social_connection.alt: Man and woman sitting at table - Consultation or planning

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL NATIVEWIND: Run 'yarn add nativewind tailwindcss' and 'npx tailwindcss init' immediately.
CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Add content paths in tailwind.config.js for './app/**/*.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}' and './src/**/*.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}'.
USE EXPO ROUTER: Ensure file-based routing in /app directory.
COMPONENT STRUCTURE: Do NOT use Shadcn/UI (it is web only). Build 'Look-alike' components using the classes provided in 'component_library'.
ACCESSIBILITY: All pressables must have 'accessibilityRole' and 'accessibilityLabel'.
THEME: Default to Light Mode with the Warm Cream background. Dark mode should use deeply desaturated warm browns (#1a1512), not pure black.
MOCK DATA: Create robust seed data for 'Medications' and 'Appointments' to visualize the layout effectively.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Avoid 'Medical Blue' (#007AFF) as primary. Use Terracotta.
Use 'Safe Area Views' for all screens.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for testing.
